subtitle.zh: 统一的 JavaScript 工具链

slogan.en: One CLI, one configuration, one consistent workflow
slogan.zh: 一个命令行、一份配置、一致的工作流

unifiedCliDesc.en: Develop, build, test, lint, publish libraries, and serve docs with the rs command.
unifiedCliDesc.zh: 通过 rs 命令完成开发、构建、测试、检查、库构建和文档开发。

oneConfigDesc.en: Configure the whole toolchain from a single rstack.config.ts file.
oneConfigDesc.zh: 在一份 rstack.config.ts 中配置完整工具链。

ecosystemPoweredDesc.en: Built on Rsbuild, Rslib, Rstest, Rslint, and Rspress.

workflowFriendlyDesc.en: Keep using your preferred runtime, package manager, and task runner.
workflowFriendlyDesc.zh: 继续使用你熟悉的运行时、包管理器和任务编排工具。
